title: Fun at Vidcon
excerpt: Got back from Vidcon yesterday and I am still feeling exhilarated and inspired and exhausted. If any of you were there and took photos or video from my DIY panel, please let me know and send them over. I got…
body:
Got back from Vidcon yesterday and I am still feeling exhilarated and inspired and exhausted. If any of you were there and took photos or video from my DIY panel, please let me know and send them over. I got basically nothing as I was the moderator. Here are a few highlights though I barely took any photos. I did try and vlog and I did Snapchat (amy_tangerine) and hope to have the YouTube video edited in the next couple weeks! For now you can check out my video from last year if you'd like.

One of the coolest things was seeing Casey again and I was wearing the tee I made for him when I did! It was awesome. Here's the DIY video in case you missed it. And I made a cameo in his vlog and the SACCONEJOLYs the same day! Love that people spotted me in the clips and let me know in the comments of this photo on Instagram. 

Though I think you should watch both these videos in their entirety, you can catch me in Casey Neistat's vlog at around 2:55 and on the SACCONEJOLYs vlog at around 7:15. Social media rocks and now I just want to figure out a way to make even more videos. Feeling inspired and I hope you are too!
